sections.heading: Grow Your ROAS to 4.2x in 90 Days

items.title: Strategic Framework That Works
items.description: Not templates. A proprietary system proven across 50+ brands. Apply it once, scale infinitely.

items.title: Expert Creative Execution
items.description: Professional copywriting and design backed by data. Every asset A/B tested before you see it.

items.title: Predictable Results
items.description: Weekly dashboards. Real-time optimization. Results guaranteed or your money back.

items.quote: Went from 1.8x to 4.2x ROAS in 30 days. The creative team actually understood our audience better than we did.
items.author: Sarah Chen

items.quote: Saved us $30K/month by dropping CAC from $82 to $52. The strategic work paid for itself in week one.
items.author: Marcus Williams

items.quote: Everything moved at once. CPM down 38%, CTR +47%, conversions +31%. This was our best quarter ever.
items.author: Priya Kanoor

sections.heading: Lock in Your 4.2x Roadmap
sections.description: Book a 30-minute strategy call. We'll audit your funnel, identify where cash is leaking, and show you the exact next steps. Only 5 spots available this week.

items.question: How long until we hit 4.2x ROAS?
items.answer: Most brands see results in 90 days. Some jump to 2-3x ROAS in month one. Timeline depends on budget and starting metrics.

items.question: What if we don't see results?
items.answer: We stand behind our work. If we don't deliver 2x+ improvement in 90 days, we work for free until you do.

items.question: Why only 5 spots per week?
items.answer: We obsess over quality. We cherry-pick clients and dedicate full-time resources. That model only works if we're selective.
